law: People must first download their clinical records from one of the before the records appear in HealthKit.
To use HealthKit, you must first enable the HealthKit capability and include the key in your app’s file, as described in .
If you don’t have such an account, you can add sample data within the Simulator as described in .
The app must request permission to read all the types that it intends to use.
Instead, anyone using the app must manually request authorization, by scrolling to the bottom of the list and tapping the Authorize button.
The sample code project requires this version of Xcode.
